summary: Comprehensive testing of GummyText TextNow/Caddy clone. All 21 backend API tests PASSED, all core frontend features verified working. Twilio webhooks, real-time messaging, chat features including reactions, attachments, and confetti all functional.
passed_tests: Landing page (Homepage) loads with bubbly design and GummyText branding
$4.99/month pricing displayed correctly on landing page
Features section with 6 feature cards displayed
'Powered by Twilio' badge in footer
Login and authentication flow works with test2@gummytext.com / Test123456
Dashboard loads with all 4 tabs: Messages, Dialer, Calls, Voicemail
Phone number displayed: (681) 261-4963
Credits (22) displayed correctly
Real-time WebSocket connection indicator working
Chat screen loads with video call button (camera icon) in header
Chat screen loads with voice call button (phone icon) in header
Attachment menu shows Photo, GIF, Voice, Video options
Voice recording UI triggers on Voice button click (requires mic permission)
Message reactions work - double-click on message shows emoji picker with ❤️😂😮😢😡👍👎🔥
Video call button shows 'Video calling coming soon!' toast (MOCKED)
Voice call button shows 'Voice calling coming soon!' toast (MOCKED)
Twilio SMS webhook endpoint responds correctly with TwiML
Twilio Voice webhook endpoint responds with voicemail TwiML
Twilio Transcription webhook endpoint works
Twilio Status webhook endpoint works
All 21 backend pytest tests PASSED
seed_data_creation: No new seed data - used existing test user with phone number (681) 261-4963
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. User test2@gummytext.com has activated Twilio number (681) 261-4963 with 22 credits. Confetti triggers on first message via AchievementProvider. Video/voice calls are MOCKED (show toast). WebSocket real-time messaging working. Twilio SMS is LIVE.

homepage_landing_page.details: Beautiful bubbly design with animated blobs, phone mockup, stats section, feature grid, pricing cards

pricing_499_month.details: $4.99/month displayed for Personal plan in pricing section

confetti_first_message.details: AchievementProvider at lines 49-52 triggers confetti on first outbound message. Uses localStorage for persistence.

message_reactions.details: Chat.js line 479: onDoubleClick={() => setShowReactions(msg.message_id)} - Shows emoji picker with 8 emojis

attachment_menu.details: Photo, GIF, Voice, Video options available at Chat.js lines 553-591

voice_message_recording.details: Voice recording UI implemented at Chat.js lines 265-331 with MediaRecorder API

video_call_button.details: Video call button at Chat.js line 429 - shows toast (MOCKED)

voice_call_button.details: Voice call button at Chat.js line 436 - shows toast (MOCKED)

websocket_realtime.details: WebSocket connection at wss://preview.../api/ws/chat works, green Wifi indicator shown

twilio_webhooks.details: All 4 Twilio webhook endpoints tested: /sms, /voice, /transcription, /status at server.py lines 1835-2072

dashboard_tabs.details: Messages, Dialer, Calls, Voicemail tabs all present with data-testid attributes

mocked_features_confirmed.media_upload: Local file handling, not uploaded to cloud storage
